# Decisions: <feature-id>

Use this file for feature-local decisions inside one governed task folder.

If the decision is cross-module, reusable, security-impacting, performance-impacting, ownership-impacting, or changes future framework behavior, create an ADR under `docs/decisions/` with `docs/templates/adr.template.md` instead.
